title: Trailer Reimagined
description: Want to make minecraft as enjoyable as in trailers? This modpack will make that possible!
body:
![Trailer Reimagined](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ad2511bf472b20d7712005bf0d542a1d37039665.png)

# Trailer Reimagined
This modpack aims to recreate the thrilling experience of game trailers as closely as possible, delivering an unbeatable level of immersion. With a barebones texture pack, fresh animations, fresh moves, and over 180 carefully selected mods, this modpack ensures that every moment in the game feels as exciting as the trailers. Dive into a world and experience the game like never before!

# Features
- Preconfigured shaders 
- Barebones texturepack
- New immersive sounds and music
- Vanilla+ structures
- Combat animations
- Player animations
- New mob animations
- New 3th person camera
- Performence boost
#   DISCLAIMER
Please allocate around 4gb to mod collection if you are planning on using distant horizons mod.
<details>
<summary>Issues or in need of support?</summary>
If you encounter any issues or need any support, join my support server on Discord.
https://discord.gg/eWPtyYUCdy

</details>

<details>
<summary>Coop Tutorial</summary>

Open to LAN as usual, then grab the link from the chat. Send it to your friends and Let the fun the begin!

![Gif](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/528f89a65ea527a37c6a82043bfd0cd7fa13e7f4.gif)
</details>
